title: New Media and Communication (English) Program Instructional Objectives
content:
New Media and Communication (English) Program Instructional Objectives

(1)

Our New Media and Communication department prepares aspiring media professionals for the digitalized world, utilizing cutting-edge tools and technologies that shape the evolving media landscape. We emphasize equipping professionals with the skills and qualifications necessary to navigate the evolving realm of new communication technologies.

(2)

Our goal is to train media professionals with advanced critical and creative thinking skills and a clear understanding of society. We strive to equip them with both theoretical and practical knowledge, as well as a mastery of the current media ecosystem.

(3)

At the New Media and Communication department, our primary focus is on educating adept new media professionals who create impactful digital content aligned with ethical standards. Our graduates excel at media management and have qualifications tailored to industry standards.

(4)

The New Media and Communication department prioritizes preparing students to create high-quality content for scholarly and industry-related purposes.

(5)

The New Media and Communication department aims to equip students with the essential knowledge and skills to succeed in today's communication and media industry.

(6)

The New Media and Communication Department, in addition to creating a solid multidisciplinary theoretical foundation covering communication, social sciences, and cultural studies, has a curriculum that aims to provide graduates with the practical knowledge and skills necessary to be successful in the academic and professional fields of new media.
